scroller_feed: CRITICAL: NEW YORK, USA TARGETED FOR SUPPLY CHAIN BREAK | GLOBAL MARKETS EXPERIENCING VOLATILITY DUE TO TRADE TENSIONS AND GEOPOLITICAL UNCERTAINTY. ECONOMIES WITH STRONG FUNDAMENTALS AND ADAPTIVE POLICIES ARE BETTER EQUIPPED TO WITHSTAND EXTERNAL PRESSURES.
